description: Happy path: contract text with complete clauses returns structured rights extraction with all fields populated

input.contract_text: The Creator grants Brand a non-exclusive license to repost the sponsored video on Brand-owned social channels (Instagram, TikTok) for a period of 90 days from the publish date. Creator retains full copyright ownership. During the campaign period (January 15 to April 15, 2026), Creator agrees not to publish sponsored content for competing home furniture brands. Brand may not run paid amplification or whitelisting without a separate written addendum. FTC disclosure is required on all sponsored posts.
input.question: platform exclusivity

expect.exclusivity.platform: present or null based on whether platforms are specified in exclusivity clause
expect.exclusivity.duration: present, uses 'to' separator not em dash
expect.license_grant: present, describes non-exclusive 90-day license on specified platforms
expect.flags: array, may be empty when all clauses are clear

prohibit: em dashes as range separators in exclusivity.duration
fabricated clause language not present in the input

description: Minimal inputs: contract text with vague and incomplete clauses flags ambiguities and recommends counsel

input.contract_text: Creator will produce one sponsored video for Brand. Brand may use the content. Exclusivity applies for a reasonable period.

expect.exclusivity.duration: null or flagged as ambiguous due to 'reasonable period'
expect.license_grant: present but vague, reflecting the source language
expect.flags: non-empty array with entries for ambiguous and missing clauses
expect.counsel_reason: present, cites specific fields or clause gaps

prohibit: fabricated specifics for vague contract language
legal advice on what terms to accept
recommend_counsel false when multiple fields are null or ambiguous

description: Edge case: neither deal_id nor contract_text provided returns structured error

expect.message: present, asks the caller to supply deal_id or contract_text

prohibit: any rights extraction output without a source
unhandled crash or missing error object
